caption: Varna offers a six-year medicine degree taught in English, with an autumn start on Bulgaria's Black Sea coast. Tuition for 2026/27 is €10,000. The 2026 route is time-sensitive: the last EU entrance exam is 3 September and paper documents are due by 11 September. Comment DOCTOR and I'll send you the free 15-minute call link. No pitch, no pressure.
note: FALLBACK ONLY. Primary is Zernio at 19:00 Irish (server-side). This fires at 19:20 only if Zernio did not post; run_queue.py checks the live feed first and deletes this entry if it did.
